3.1.5: Face-to-face: 1 item from List A OR 1 item from List B plus 1 item from List C.
Postal: 2 items required, one must be from List A or B.
List A includes: Signed passport, photocard driving licence, National Identity card, Firearms/shotgun licence, NI voter ID card.
List B includes: Old style full driving licence, state/local benefit entitlement letter, HMRC Tax Notification.

List C includes: Council tax bill, utility bill (excluding mobile/internet), bank/building society statement/passbook, mortgage statement, rent card/tenancy agreement, credit card statement, court appointment instrument.
